_publications._publicationTitle: Merlin/NF2 loss-driven tumorigenesis linked to CRL4(DCAF1)-mediated inhibition of the hippo pathway kinases Lats1 and 2 in the nucleus.

_contextSnippet: In response to re-expression of Merlin, these cells undergo proliferation arrest and are no longer tumorigenic
details: Undergo proliferation arrest and are no longer tumorigenic in response to re-expression of Merlin
